hotel.name: Nyang Ebay Surf Camp
hotel.review_summary: Traditional beachfront bungalows on Masokut Island — 5 world-class breaks within 30-min walk, family-run, full-board meals, guided Padang transfers by Handra.

hotel_alt.name: Oinan Lodge
hotel_alt.review_summary: Budget seaside lodge on Tuapejat — minimal infrastructure, strong early reviews, lower price point.

hotel.name: Ola Ola Lombok
hotel.review_summary: Charming, trendy guesthouse right at Selong Belanak beach — 80 reviews, 4.7 rating, boutique feel at a budget price.
